meta.subject: RE-UE4SS (UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS) release + experimental timeline, focused on what affects runtime DataTable mods on UE5.4 games
meta.notes: Partial/seed timeline from initial recon; the research workflow extends this through July 2026 and flags breaking changes relevant to TFWWorkbench. breaking=true means a change that plausibly affects a runtime DataTable editor.

versions.note: Major release. Breaking: FName ctor default EFindName FNAME_Find -> FNAME_Add; new proxy DLL scheme (dwmapi.dll replaces xinput1_3.dll); install layout moved into a ue4ss/ subfolder.
Patch for 3.0.0. C++ mods must be rebuilt. Predates UE5.4 support, so not the build TFW uses.
Rolling CI builds on the modern patternsleuth resolver branch. This is the channel UE5.4.2 games like TFW actually use. Exact build that breaks TFWWorkbench = the open question this repo resolves.
